narrative:
Precinct Letart (precinct in Meigs County) has 468 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
